backend/src/controllers/governanceContro.summary: Governance approval, compliance-pack, and policy endpoints are still consolidated in one controller.
backend/src/controllers/governanceContro.nextStep: Move approval workflow orchestration and policy pack assembly into dedicated governance services and slimmer route handlers.

backend/src/controllers/incidentControll.summary: Incident intake, remediation, evidence, and workflow state transitions remain coupled in one controller.
backend/src/controllers/incidentControll.nextStep: Split incident lifecycle actions into service-backed handlers for intake, evidence, and remediation.

backend/src/controllers/irIncidentContro.summary: IR incident response endpoints still mix escalation, evidence, and operator workflow concerns.
backend/src/controllers/irIncidentContro.nextStep: Extract escalation and evidence orchestration into incident-response services with route-level composition only.

backend/src/controllers/licenseeControll.summary: Licensee enrollment, policy, and operational endpoints still share one controller surface.
backend/src/controllers/licenseeControll.nextStep: Separate licensee administration from operational actions and move policy assembly into services.

backend/src/controllers/printerAgentJobC.summary: Printer agent job scheduling, retries, and status reconciliation are still controller-led.
backend/src/controllers/printerAgentJobC.nextStep: Move job orchestration and reconciliation into printer-agent services and keep controllers request-focused.

backend/src/controllers/printerControlle.summary: Printer provisioning and operational state changes remain bundled into a single controller.
backend/src/controllers/printerControlle.nextStep: Split provisioning flows from operational actions and centralize validation/state transitions in services.

backend/src/controllers/printerGatewayCo.summary: Gateway registration, trust exchange, and delivery workflow logic are still heavily centralized.
backend/src/controllers/printerGatewayCo.nextStep: Extract gateway trust negotiation and delivery orchestration into dedicated printer gateway services.

backend/src/controllers/qrController.ts.summary: QR issuance, lifecycle, operator actions, and reporting are still concentrated in one legacy controller.
backend/src/controllers/qrController.ts.nextStep: Break QR issuance, lifecycle operations, and reporting endpoints into focused controller modules backed by shared services.

backend/src/controllers/userController.t.summary: User administration, invitations, and account operations still share a large controller entrypoint.
backend/src/controllers/userController.t.nextStep: Split user admin flows from self-service account operations and move identity workflow logic into services.

backend/src/controllers/verify/claimHand.summary: Ownership claim handling still combines claim validation, persistence, and response shaping.
backend/src/controllers/verify/claimHand.nextStep: Extract claim decision and ownership update orchestration into verify-domain services.

backend/src/controllers/verify/verificat.summary: The public verify controller now delegates post-scan orchestration to a service, but still coordinates multiple entry paths and response modes.
backend/src/controllers/verify/verificat.nextStep: Split manual lookup, signed-label verification, and recovery/error response paths into focused verify handlers that share service-level orchestration.

backend/src/controllers/verify/verifyPre.summary: Verify presentation logic still centralizes public-proof messaging and readiness mapping in one file.
backend/src/controllers/verify/verifyPre.nextStep: Separate proof messaging, readiness mapping, and public response copy into smaller presentation modules.

src/pages/AuditLogs.tsx.summary: Audit log filtering, export controls, and table rendering remain tightly coupled in one page.
src/pages/AuditLogs.tsx.nextStep: Move filter state, export actions, and table sections into dedicated audit-log feature components/hooks.

src/pages/ConnectorDownload.tsx.summary: Connector download guidance, platform branching, and operator actions still live in one large page.
src/pages/ConnectorDownload.tsx.nextStep: Split platform-specific flows and operator guidance blocks into dedicated connector feature sections.

src/pages/PrinterDiagnostics.tsx.summary: Printer diagnostics combines status dashboards, troubleshooting workflows, and operational controls in one page.
src/pages/PrinterDiagnostics.tsx.nextStep: Break diagnostics widgets, troubleshooting actions, and historical views into focused printer-diagnostics feature modules.

src/pages/PrinterSetup.tsx.summary: Printer setup still bundles onboarding, connection state, and troubleshooting logic in a single page.
src/pages/PrinterSetup.tsx.nextStep: Split setup wizard, connection health, and remediation flows into feature components and hooks.
